71	        self.dtype = dtype
72	        # padding head_dim to a multiple of 32 (stricter than fwd's 16) due to
73	        # backward kernel register layout requirements for dQ/dK/dV accumulation
74	        hdim_multiple_of = 32
75	        self.head_dim_padded = int(math.ceil(head_dim / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
76	        head_dim_v = head_dim_v if head_dim_v is not None else head_dim
77	        self.same_hdim_kv = head_dim == head_dim_v
78	        self.head_dim_v_padded = int(math.ceil(head_dim_v / hdim_multiple_of) * hdim_multiple_of)
79	        # Can save registers (and hence be faster) if we don't have to check hdim predication
80	        self.check_hdim_oob = head_dim != self.head_dim_padded
81	        self.check_hdim_v_oob = head_dim_v != self.head_dim_v_padded
82	        self.qhead_per_kvhead = qhead_per_kvhead
83	        self.m_block_size = m_block_size
84	        self.n_block_size = n_block_size
85	        self.num_threads = num_threads
86	        self.pack_gqa = pack_gqa
87	        self.is_causal = is_causal
88	        self.is_local = is_local
89	        self.num_stages_Q = num_stages_Q
90	        self.num_stages_dO = num_stages_dO
91	        self.SdP_swapAB = SdP_swapAB
92	        self.dKV_swapAB = dKV_swapAB
93	        self.dQ_swapAB = dQ_swapAB
94	        self.AtomLayoutMSdP = AtomLayoutMSdP
95	        self.AtomLayoutNdKV = AtomLayoutNdKV
96	        self.AtomLayoutMdQ = AtomLayoutMdQ
97	        num_mma_warps = self.num_threads // cute.arch.WARP_SIZE
98	        self.Mma_dKV_is_RS = AtomLayoutMSdP == 1 and AtomLayoutNdKV == num_mma_warps and SdP_swapAB and not dKV_swapAB
99	        self.V_in_regs = V_in_regs
100	        self.share_QV_smem = V_in_regs
101	        self.score_mod = score_mod
102	        self.score_mod_bwd = score_mod_bwd
103	
104	    @staticmethod
105	    def can_implement(
106	        dtype, head_dim, head_dim_v, m_block_size, n_block_size, num_stages_Q, num_stages_dO,
107	        num_threads, is_causal,
108	        V_in_regs=False
109	    ) -> bool:
110	        """Check if the kernel can be implemented with the given parameters.
111	
112	        :param dtype: data type
113	        :type dtype: cutlass.Numeric
114	        :param head_dim: head dimension
115	        :type head_dim: int
116	        :param m_block_size: m block size
117	        :type m_block_size: int
118	        :param n_block_size: n block size
119	        :type n_block_size: int
120	        :param num_threads: number of threads
121	        :type num_threads: int
122	        :param is_causal: is causal
123	        :type is_causal: bool
124	
125	        :return: True if the kernel can be implemented, False otherwise
126	        :rtype: bool
127	        """
128	        if dtype not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]:
129	            return False
130	        if head_dim % 8 != 0:
131	            return False
132	        if head_dim_v % 8 != 0:
133	            return False
134	        if n_block_size % 16 != 0:
135	            return False
136	        if num_threads % 32 != 0:
137	            return False
138	        # Check if block size setting is out of shared memory capacity
139	        # Shared memory usage: Q tile + (K tile + V tile) where K and V use the same tile size
140	        smem_usage_Q = m_block_size * head_dim * num_stages_Q * 2
141	        smem_usage_dO = m_block_size * head_dim_v * num_stages_dO * 2
142	        smem_usage_K = n_block_size * head_dim * 2
143	        smem_usage_V = n_block_size * head_dim_v * 2
144	        smem_usage_QV = (smem_usage_Q + smem_usage_V) if not V_in_regs else max(smem_usage_Q, smem_usage_V)
145	        smem_usage = smem_usage_QV + smem_usage_dO + smem_usage_K
146	        smem_capacity = utils_basic.get_smem_capacity_in_bytes("sm_80")
147	        if smem_usage > smem_capacity:
148	            return False
149	        return True
150	
151	    def _check_type(
152	        self,
153	        mQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
154	        mK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
155	        mV_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
156	        mdO_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
157	        mLSE_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
158	        mdPsum_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
159	        mdQaccum_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
160	        mdK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
161	        mdV_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric],
162	        mCuSeqlensQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
163	        mCuSeqlensK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
164	        mSeqUsedQ_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
165	        mSeqUsedK_type: Type[cutlass.Numeric] | None,
166	    ):
167	        if cutlass.const_expr(not (mQ_type == mK_type == mV_type == mdO_type)):
168	            raise TypeError("All tensors must have the same data type")
169	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1):
170	            if cutlass.const_expr(not (mdK_type == mdV_type == mQ_type)):
171	                raise TypeError("mdK and mdV tensors must have the same data type as mQ")
172	        else:
173	            if cutlass.const_expr(not (mdK_type == mdV_type == cutlass.Float32)):
174	                raise TypeError("mdKaccum and mdVaccum tensors must have the data type Float32")
175	        if cutlass.const_expr(mQ_type not in [cutlass.Float16, cutlass.BFloat16]):
176	            raise TypeError("Only Float16 or BFloat16 is supported")
177	        if cutlass.const_expr(mLSE_type not in [cutlass.Float32]):
178	            raise TypeError("LSE tensor must be Float32")
179	        if cutlass.const_expr(mdPsum_type not in [cutlass.Float32]):
180	            raise TypeError("dPsum tensor must be Float32")
181	        if cutlass.const_expr(mdQaccum_type not in [cutlass.Float32]):
182	            raise TypeError("dQaccum tensor must be Float32")
183	        if cutlass.const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ_type not in [None, cutlass.Int32]):
184	            raise TypeError("cuSeqlensQ tensor must be Int32")
185	        if cutlass.const_expr(mCuSeqlensK_type not in [None, cutlass.Int32]):
186	            raise TypeError("cuSeqlensK tensor must be Int32")
187	        if cutlass.const_expr(mSeqUsedQ_type not in [None, cutlass.Int32]):
188	            raise TypeError("SeqUsedQ tensor must be Int32")
189	        if cutlass.const_expr(mSeqUsedK_type not in [None, cutlass.Int32]):
190	            raise TypeError("SeqUsedK tensor must be Int32")
191	        assert mQ_type == self.dtype
192	
193	    def _setup_attributes(self):
194	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
195	        # Shared memory layout: Q/K/V
196	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
197	        sQ_layout_atom = sm80_utils.get_smem_layout_atom(self.dtype, self.head_dim_padded)
198	        self.sQ_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
199	            sQ_layout_atom, (self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_padded, self.num_stages_Q), (0, 1, 2),
200	        )
201	        sK_layout_atom = sQ_layout_atom
202	        self.sK_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
203	            sK_layout_atom, (self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_padded), (0, 1),
204	        )
205	        sV_layout_atom = sm80_utils.get_smem_layout_atom(self.dtype, self.head_dim_v_padded)
206	        self.sV_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
207	            sV_layout_atom, (self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded), (0, 1),
208	        )
209	        sdO_layout_atom = sV_layout_atom
210	        self.sdO_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
211	            sdO_layout_atom, (self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded, self.num_stages_dO), (0, 1, 2),
212	        )
213	        # TODO: do we set swizzle to be 3 here explicitly?
214	        sPdS_layout_atom = sm80_utils.get_smem_layout_atom(self.dtype, self.n_block_size)
215	        self.sPdS_layout = cute.tile_to_shape(
216	            sPdS_layout_atom, (self.m_block_size, self.n_block_size), (0, 1),
217	        )
218	        # We set stride to be multiple of 64 so that if ShuffleLSE, even if threads read from sLSE but out of bounds,
219	        # it's still a valid smem address.
220	        self.sLSE_layout = cute.make_layout(
221	            (self.m_block_size, self.num_stages_Q),
222	            stride=(1, cute.round_up(self.m_block_size, 64)),
223	        )
224	        sLSEMma_layout = cute.make_layout(
225	            (self.m_block_size, self.n_block_size, self.num_stages_Q),
226	            stride=(1, 0, cute.round_up(self.m_block_size, 64)),
227	        )
228	        sLSEMma_layout_transposed = cute.make_layout(
229	            (self.n_block_size, self.m_block_size, self.num_stages_Q),
230	            stride=(0, 1, cute.round_up(self.m_block_size, 64)),
231	        )
232	        self.sLSEMma_layout = sLSEMma_layout if not self.SdP_swapAB else sLSEMma_layout_transposed
233	
234	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
235	        # GMEM Tiled copy:
236	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
237	        # Thread layouts for copies
238	        universal_copy_bits = 128
239	        async_copy_elems = universal_copy_bits // self.dtype.width
240	        # atom_async_copy: async copy atom for QKV load
241	        atom_async_copy = cute.make_copy_atom(
242	            cpasync.CopyG2SOp(cache_mode=cpasync.LoadCacheMode.GLOBAL),
243	            self.dtype,
244	            num_bits_per_copy=universal_copy_bits,
245	        )
246	        # atom_universal_copy: universal copy atom for O store
247	        atom_universal_copy = cute.make_copy_atom(
248	            cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(), self.dtype, num_bits_per_copy=universal_copy_bits,
249	        )
250	        # tQK_layout: thread layout for QK load
251	        tQK_shape_dim_1 = sQ_layout_atom.outer.shape[1] // async_copy_elems
252	        assert self.num_threads % tQK_shape_dim_1 == 0, "num_threads must be divisible by tQK_shape_dim_1"
253	        tQK_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
254	            (self.num_threads // tQK_shape_dim_1, tQK_shape_dim_1), order=(1, 0),
255	        )
256	        # Do we need to check if we overshot kBlockM when we load Q?
257	        self.is_even_m_smem_q = self.m_block_size % tQK_layout.shape[0] == 0
258	        # Do we need to check if we overshot kBlockN when we load K?
259	        self.is_even_n_smem_k = self.n_block_size % tQK_layout.shape[0] == 0
260	        tVdO_shape_dim_1 = sV_layout_atom.outer.shape[1] // async_copy_elems
261	        assert self.num_threads % tVdO_shape_dim_1 == 0, "num_threads must be divisible by tVdO_shape_dim_1"
262	        tVdO_layout = cute.make_ordered_layout(
263	            (self.num_threads // tVdO_shape_dim_1, tVdO_shape_dim_1), order=(1, 0),
264	        )
265	        # Do we need to check if we overshot kBlockN when we load V?
266	        self.is_even_n_smem_v = self.n_block_size % tVdO_layout.shape[0] == 0
267	        self.is_even_m_smem_do = self.m_block_size % tVdO_layout.shape[0] == 0
268	
269	        # Value layouts for copies
270	        vQKVdO_layout = cute.make_layout((1, async_copy_elems))
271	
272	        # gmem_tiled_copy_QK: tiled copy for QK load
273	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_QK = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_async_copy, tQK_layout, vQKVdO_layout)
274	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_VdO = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_async_copy, tVdO_layout, vQKVdO_layout)
275	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_dK = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_universal_copy, tQK_layout, vQKVdO_layout)
276	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_dV = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(atom_universal_copy, tVdO_layout, vQKVdO_layout)
277	        async_copy_elems_accum = universal_copy_bits // cutlass.Float32.width
278	
279	        # I think we wouldn't require this with smarter padding
280	        if cutlass.const_expr(not self.varlen_q):
281	            async_copy_elems_accum = universal_copy_bits // cutlass.Float32.width
282	            atom_async_copy_accum = cute.make_copy_atom(
283	                cpasync.CopyG2SOp(cache_mode=cpasync.LoadCacheMode.GLOBAL),
284	                cutlass.Float32,
285	                num_bits_per_copy=universal_copy_bits,
286	            )
287	        else:
288	            async_copy_elems_accum = 1
289	            atom_async_copy_accum = cute.make_copy_atom(
290	                cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(),
291	                cutlass.Float32,
292	                num_bits_per_copy=cutlass.Float32.width,
293	            )
294	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_LSE = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(
295	            atom_async_copy_accum,
296	            cute.make_layout(self.num_threads),
297	            cute.make_layout(async_copy_elems_accum),
298	        )
299	        self.gmem_tiled_copy_dQaccum = cute.make_tiled_copy_tv(
300	            cute.make_copy_atom(
301	                cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(), cutlass.Float32, num_bits_per_copy=cutlass.Float32.width
302	            ),
303	            cute.make_layout(self.num_threads),
304	            cute.make_layout(1)
305	        )
306	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead > 1):
307	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_dK = self.gmem_tiled_copy_dQaccum
308	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_dV = self.gmem_tiled_copy_dQaccum
309	
310	    def _get_tiled_mma(self):
311	        num_mma_warps = self.num_threads // 32
312	        AtomLayoutSdP = (self.AtomLayoutMSdP, num_mma_warps // self.AtomLayoutMSdP, 1) if cutlass.const_expr(not self.SdP_swapAB) else (num_mma_warps // self.AtomLayoutMSdP, self.AtomLayoutMSdP, 1)
313	        tiled_mma_sdp = cute.make_tiled_mma(
314	            warp.MmaF16BF16Op(self.dtype, cutlass.Float32, (16, 8, 16)),
315	            AtomLayoutSdP,
316	            permutation_mnk=(AtomLayoutSdP[0] * 16, AtomLayoutSdP[1] * 16, 16),
317	        )
318	        AtomLayoutdKV = (self.AtomLayoutNdKV, num_mma_warps // self.AtomLayoutNdKV, 1) if cutlass.const_expr(not self.dKV_swapAB) else (num_mma_warps // self.AtomLayoutNdKV, self.AtomLayoutNdKV, 1)
319	        tiled_mma_dkv = cute.make_tiled_mma(
320	            warp.MmaF16BF16Op(self.dtype, cutlass.Float32, (16, 8, 16)),
321	            AtomLayoutdKV,
322	            permutation_mnk=(AtomLayoutdKV[0] * 16, AtomLayoutdKV[1] * 16, 16),
323	        )
324	        AtomLayoutdQ = (self.AtomLayoutMdQ, num_mma_warps // self.AtomLayoutMdQ, 1) if cutlass.const_expr(not self.dQ_swapAB) else (num_mma_warps // self.AtomLayoutMdQ, self.AtomLayoutMdQ, 1)
325	        tiled_mma_dq = cute.make_tiled_mma(
326	            warp.MmaF16BF16Op(self.dtype, cutlass.Float32, (16, 8, 16)),
327	            AtomLayoutdQ,
328	            permutation_mnk=(AtomLayoutdQ[0] * 16, AtomLayoutdQ[1] * 16, 16),
329	        )
330	        return tiled_mma_sdp, tiled_mma_dkv, tiled_mma_dq
331	
332	    def _get_shared_storage_cls(self):
333	        sQ_struct, sK_struct, sV_struct, sdO_struct = [
334	            cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cute.cosize(layout)], 1024]
335	            for layout in (self.sQ_layout, self.sK_layout, self.sV_layout, self.sdO_layout)
336	        ]
337	        cosize_sQV = max(cute.cosize(self.sQ_layout), cute.cosize(self.sV_layout))
338	        sQV_struct = cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cosize_sQV], 1024]
339	        sLSE_struct, sdPsum_struct = [
340	            cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[cutlass.Float32, cute.cosize(layout)], 128]
341	            for layout in (self.sLSE_layout, self.sLSE_layout)
342	        ]
343	        sP_struct, sdS_struct = [
344	            cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cute.cosize(layout)], 128]
345	            for layout in (self.sPdS_layout, self.sPdS_layout)
346	        ]
347	
348	        @cute.struct
349	        class SharedStorageSeparateQV:
350	            sK: sK_struct
351	            sV: sV_struct
352	            sQ: sQ_struct
353	            sdO: sdO_struct
354	            sLSE: sLSE_struct
355	            sdPsum: sdPsum_struct
356	            sP: sP_struct
357	            sdS: sdS_struct
358	            # TODO: the case where there's no sP
359	
360	        @cute.struct
361	        class SharedStorageSharedQV:
362	            sK: sK_struct
363	            sV: sV_struct
364	            sQ: sQV_struct
365	            sdO: sdO_struct
366	            sLSE: sLSE_struct
367	            sdPsum: sdPsum_struct
368	            sP: sP_struct
369	            sdS: sdS_struct
370	
371	        return SharedStorageSeparateQV if cutlass.const_expr(not self.share_QV_smem) else SharedStorageSharedQV
372	
373	    @cute.jit
374	    def __call__(
375	        self,
376	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
377	        mK: cute.Tensor,
378	        mV: cute.Tensor,
379	        mdO: cute.Tensor,
380	        mLSE: cute.Tensor,
381	        mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
382	        mdQaccum: cute.Tensor,
383	        mdK: cute.Tensor,
384	        mdV: cute.Tensor,
385	        softmax_scale: cutlass.Float32,
386	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
387	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
388	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
389	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
390	        window_size_left: Int32 | int | None = None,
391	        window_size_right: Int32 | int | None = None,
392	        mdQ_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
393	        mdK_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
394	        mdV_semaphore: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
395	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
396	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
397	        # Always keep stream as the last parameter (EnvStream: obtained implicitly via TVM FFI).
398	        stream: cuda.CUstream = None,
399	    ):
400	        assert mdQ_semaphore is None and mdK_semaphore is None and mdV_semaphore is None, (
401	            "determinism not supported yet for Sm80"
402	        )
403	        # Get the data type and check if it is fp16 or bf16
404	        self._check_type(*(t.element_type if t is not None else None
405	                           for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum, mdK, mdV, mCuSeqlensQ, mCuSeqlensK, mSeqUsedQ, mSeqUsedK)))
406	        mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum, mdK, mdV = [
407	            assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mdO, mLSE, mdPsum, mdQaccum, mdK, mdV)
408	        ]
409	        self.varlen_q = (mCuSeqlensQ is not None)
410	        self._setup_attributes()
411	        SharedStorage = self._get_shared_storage_cls()
412	        tiled_mma_sdp, tiled_mma_dkv, tiled_mma_dq = self._get_tiled_mma()
413	
414	        num_head = mQ.shape[1] if cutlass.const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None) else mQ.shape[2]
415	
416	        if cutlass.const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is not None):
417	            TileScheduler = SingleTileVarlenScheduler
418	            num_batch = mCuSeqlensK.shape[0] - 1
419	        else:
420	            TileScheduler = SingleTileScheduler
421	            num_batch = mK.shape[0]
422	
423	        # Uses seqlen k, etc. since main bwd kernel's blocks are over n
424	        tile_sched_args = TileSchedulerArguments(
425	            num_block=cute.ceil_div(mK.shape[1], self.n_block_size),
426	            num_head=num_head,
427	            num_batch=num_batch,
428	            num_splits=1,
429	            seqlen_k=0,
430	            headdim=mK.shape[2],
431	            headdim_v=mV.shape[2],
432	            total_q=mK.shape[0],
433	            tile_shape_mn=(self.n_block_size, self.m_block_size),
434	            qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead if cutlass.const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
435	            mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensK,
436	            mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedK,
437	        )
438	
439	        tile_sched_params = TileScheduler.to_underlying_arguments(tile_sched_args)
440	        grid_dim = TileScheduler.get_grid_shape(tile_sched_params)
441	
442	        softmax_scale_log2, _ = utils.compute_softmax_scale_log2(
443	            softmax_scale, self.score_mod
444	        )
445	        self.kernel(
446	            mQ,
447	            mK,
448	            mV,
449	            mdO,
450	            mLSE,
451	            mdPsum,
452	            mdQaccum,
453	            mdK,
454	            mdV,
455	            mCuSeqlensQ,
456	            mCuSeqlensK,
457	            mSeqUsedQ,
458	            mSeqUsedK,
459	            softmax_scale,
460	            softmax_scale_log2,
461	            window_size_left,
462	            window_size_right,
463	            self.sQ_layout,
464	            self.sK_layout,
465	            self.sV_layout,
466	            self.sdO_layout,
467	            self.sPdS_layout,
468	            self.sLSE_layout,
469	            self.sLSEMma_layout,
470	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_QK,
471	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_VdO,
472	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_dK,
473	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_dV,
474	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_LSE,
475	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_dQaccum,
476	            tiled_mma_sdp,
477	            tiled_mma_dkv,
478	            tiled_mma_dq,
479	            SharedStorage,
480	            tile_sched_params,
481	            TileScheduler,
482	            aux_data,
483	        ).launch(
484	            grid=grid_dim,
485	            block=[self.num_threads, 1, 1],
486	            smem=SharedStorage.size_in_bytes(),
487	            stream=stream,
488	        )
489	
490	    @cute.kernel
491	    def kernel(
492	        self,
493	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
494	        mK: cute.Tensor,
495	        mV: cute.Tensor,
496	        mdO: cute.Tensor,
497	        mLSE: cute.Tensor,
498	        mdPsum: cute.Tensor,
499	        mdQaccum: cute.Tensor,
500	        mdK: cute.Tensor,
501	        mdV: cute.Tensor,
502	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
503	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
504	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
505	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
506	        softmax_scale: cutlass.Float32,
507	        softmax_scale_log2: cutlass.Float32,
508	        window_size_left: Optional[Int32],
509	        window_size_right: Optional[Int32],
510	        sQ_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
511	        sK_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
512	        sV_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
513	        sdO_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
514	        sPdS_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
515	        sLSE_layout: cute.Layout,
516	        sLSEMma_layout: cute.Layout,
517	        gmem_tiled_copy_QK: cute.TiledCopy,
518	        gmem_tiled_copy_VdO: cute.TiledCopy,
519	        gmem_tiled_copy_dK: cute.TiledCopy,
520	        gmem_tiled_copy_dV: cute.TiledCopy,
521	        gmem_tiled_copy_LSE: cute.TiledCopy,
522	        gmem_tiled_copy_dQaccum: cute.TiledCopy,
523	        tiled_mma_sdp: cute.TiledMma,
524	        tiled_mma_dkv: cute.TiledMma,
525	        tiled_mma_dq: cute.TiledMma,
526	        SharedStorage: cutlass.Constexpr,
527	        tile_sched_params: ParamsBase,
528	        TileScheduler: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
529	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
530	    ):
531	        # Thread index, block index
532	        tidx, _, _ = cute.arch.thread_idx()
533	
534	        tile_scheduler = TileScheduler.create(tile_sched_params)
535	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
536	
537	        n_block, head_idx, batch_idx, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
538	
539	        if work_tile.is_valid_tile:
540	            seqlen = SeqlenInfoQK.create(
541	                batch_idx,
542	                mQ.shape[1],
543	                mK.shape[1],
544	                mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
545	                mCuSeqlensK=mCuSeqlensK,
546	                mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
547	                mSeqUsedK=mSeqUsedK,
548	                tile_m=self.m_block_size,
549	                tile_n=self.n_block_size,
550	            )
551	
552	            block_info = BlockInfo(
553	                self.m_block_size,
554	                self.n_block_size,
555	                self.is_causal,
556	                self.is_local,
557	                False,
558	                window_size_left,
559	                window_size_right,
560	            )
561	            m_block_min, m_block_max = block_info.get_m_block_min_max(seqlen, n_block)
562	            # TODO: return early if m_block_max == 0
563	
564	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
565	            # Get the appropriate tiles for this thread block.
566	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
567	            blkQ_shape = (self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_padded)
568	            blkK_shape = (self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_padded)
569	            blkV_shape = (self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded)
570	            blkdO_shape = (self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded)
571	
572	            if cutlass.const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q):
573	                mQ_cur = mQ[batch_idx, None, head_idx, None]
574	                mLSE_cur = mLSE[batch_idx, head_idx, None]
575	                mdO_cur = mdO[batch_idx, None, head_idx, None]
576	                mdPsum_cur = mdPsum[batch_idx, head_idx, None]
577	                mdQaccum_cur = mdQaccum[batch_idx, head_idx, None]
578	            else:
579	                padded_offset_q = seqlen.padded_offset_q
580	                mQ_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_q, 0), mQ[None, head_idx, None])
581	                mLSE_cur = cute.domain_offset((padded_offset_q,), mLSE[head_idx, None])
582	                mdO_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_q, 0), mdO[None, head_idx, None])
583	                mdPsum_cur = cute.domain_offset((padded_offset_q,), mdPsum[head_idx, None])
584	                mdQaccum_cur = cute.domain_offset((padded_offset_q * self.head_dim_padded,), mdQaccum[head_idx, None])
585	            head_idx_kv = head_idx // self.qhead_per_kvhead if cutlass.const_expr(not self.pack_gqa) else head_idx
586	
587	            if cutlass.const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k):
588	                mK_cur, mV_cur = [t[batch_idx, None, head_idx_kv, None] for t in (mK, mV)]
589	            else:
590	                mK_cur, mV_cur = [cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_k, 0), t[None, head_idx_kv, None]) for t in (mK, mV)]
591	
592	            # (m_block_size, head_dim, m_block)
593	            gQ = cute.local_tile(mQ_cur, blkQ_shape, (None, 0))
594	            # (n_block_size, head_dim)
595	            gK = cute.local_tile(mK_cur, blkK_shape, (n_block, 0))
596	            # (n_block_size, head_dim_v)
597	            gV = cute.local_tile(mV_cur, blkV_shape, (n_block, 0))
598	            # (m_block_size, head_dim_v, m_block)
599	            gdO = cute.local_tile(mdO_cur, blkdO_shape, (None, 0))
600	            gLSE = cute.local_tile(mLSE_cur, (self.m_block_size,), (None,))
601	            gdPsum = cute.local_tile(mdPsum_cur, (self.m_block_size,), (None,))
602	            gdQaccum = cute.local_tile(mdQaccum_cur, (self.m_block_size * self.head_dim_padded,), (None,))
603	
604	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
605	            # Get shared memory buffer
606	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
607	            smem = cutlass.utils.SmemAllocator()
608	            storage = smem.allocate(SharedStorage)
609	            sQ = storage.sQ.get_tensor(sQ_layout)
610	            sK = storage.sK.get_tensor(sK_layout)
611	            if cutlass.const_expr(not self.share_QV_smem):
612	                sV = storage.sV.get_tensor(sV_layout)
613	            else:
614	                sV = cute.make_tensor(cute.recast_ptr(sQ.iterator, dtype=self.dtype), sV_layout)
615	            sdO = storage.sdO.get_tensor(sdO_layout)
616	            sP = storage.sP.get_tensor(sPdS_layout)
617	            sdS = storage.sdS.get_tensor(sPdS_layout)
618	            sLSE = storage.sLSE.get_tensor(sLSE_layout)
619	            sdPsum = storage.sdPsum.get_tensor(sLSE_layout)
620	            sLSEMma = storage.sLSE.get_tensor(sLSEMma_layout)
621	            sdPsumMma = storage.sdPsum.get_tensor(sLSEMma_layout)
622	
623	            # Transpose view of tensors for tiled mma
624	            sQt, sdOt, sKt, sPt, sdSt = [layout_utils.transpose_view(t) for t in (sQ, sdO, sK, sP, sdS)]
625	
626	            gmem_thr_copy_QK = gmem_tiled_copy_QK.get_slice(tidx)
627	            gmem_thr_copy_VdO = gmem_tiled_copy_VdO.get_slice(tidx)
628	            gmem_thr_copy_lse = gmem_tiled_copy_LSE.get_slice(tidx)
629	            gmem_thr_copy_dQaccum = gmem_tiled_copy_dQaccum.get_slice(tidx)
630	            # (CPY_Atom, CPY_M, CPY_K, m_block)
631	            tQgQ = gmem_thr_copy_QK.partition_S(gQ)
632	            tQsQ = gmem_thr_copy_QK.partition_D(sQ)
633	            # (CPY_Atom, CPY_N, CPY_K)
634	            tKgK = gmem_thr_copy_QK.partition_S(gK)
635	            tKsK = gmem_thr_copy_QK.partition_D(sK)
636	            # (CPY_Atom, CPY_N, CPY_K)
637	            tVgV = gmem_thr_copy_VdO.partition_S(gV)
638	            tVsV = gmem_thr_copy_VdO.partition_D(sV)
639	            # (CPY_Atom, CPY_M, CPY_K, m_block)
640	            tdOgdO = gmem_thr_copy_VdO.partition_S(gdO)
641	            tdOsdO = gmem_thr_copy_VdO.partition_D(sdO)
642	            tLSEgLSE = gmem_thr_copy_lse.partition_S(gLSE)
643	            tLSEsLSE = gmem_thr_copy_lse.partition_D(sLSE)
644	            tLSEgdPsum = gmem_thr_copy_lse.partition_S(gdPsum)
645	            tLSEsdPsum = gmem_thr_copy_lse.partition_D(sdPsum)
646	            tdQgdQaccum = gmem_thr_copy_dQaccum.partition_S(gdQaccum)
647	
648	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
649	            # Tile MMA compute thread partitions and allocate accumulators
650	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
651	            thr_mma_sdp = tiled_mma_sdp.get_slice(tidx)
652	            thr_mma_dkv = tiled_mma_dkv.get_slice(tidx)
653	            thr_mma_dq = tiled_mma_dq.get_slice(tidx)
654	            acc_shape_dK = thr_mma_dkv.partition_shape_C((self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_padded))
655	            acc_shape_dV = thr_mma_dkv.partition_shape_C((self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded))
656	            acc_dK = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_dK, cutlass.Float32)
657	            acc_dV = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_dV, cutlass.Float32)
658	            acc_dK.fill(0.0)
659	            acc_dV.fill(0.0)
660	
661	            tSrQ = utils.mma_make_fragment_A(sQ[None, None, 0], thr_mma_sdp, swapAB=self.SdP_swapAB)
662	            tSrK = utils.mma_make_fragment_B(sK, thr_mma_sdp, swapAB=self.SdP_swapAB)
663	            tdPrdO = utils.mma_make_fragment_A(sdO[None, None, 0], thr_mma_sdp, swapAB=self.SdP_swapAB)
664	            tdPrV = utils.mma_make_fragment_B(sV, thr_mma_sdp, swapAB=self.SdP_swapAB)
665	            tdVrP = utils.mma_make_fragment_A(sPt, thr_mma_dkv, swapAB=self.dKV_swapAB)
666	            tdVrdO = utils.mma_make_fragment_B(sdOt[None, None, 0], thr_mma_dkv, swapAB=self.dKV_swapAB)
667	            tdKrdS = utils.mma_make_fragment_A(sdSt, thr_mma_dkv, swapAB=self.dKV_swapAB)
668	            tdKrQ = utils.mma_make_fragment_B(sQt[None, None, 0], thr_mma_dkv, swapAB=self.dKV_swapAB)
669	            tdQrdS = utils.mma_make_fragment_A(sdS, thr_mma_dq, swapAB=self.dQ_swapAB)
670	            tdQrK = utils.mma_make_fragment_B(sKt, thr_mma_dq, swapAB=self.dQ_swapAB)
671	
672	            LSEslice = (None, 0, None) if cutlass.const_expr(not self.SdP_swapAB) else (0, None, None)
673	            tSsLSEMma = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(thr_mma_sdp.partition_C(sLSEMma))[LSEslice]
674	            tSsdPsumMma = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(thr_mma_sdp.partition_C(sdPsumMma))[LSEslice]
675	
676	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
677	            # Smem copy atom tiling
678	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
679	            smem_copy_atom = cute.make_copy_atom(
680	                warp.LdMatrix8x8x16bOp(transpose=False, num_matrices=4), self.dtype,
681	            )
682	            smem_copy_atom_transposed = cute.make_copy_atom(
683	                warp.LdMatrix8x8x16bOp(transpose=True, num_matrices=4), self.dtype,
684	            )
685	            smem_thr_copy_QdO = utils.make_tiled_copy_A(
686	                smem_copy_atom, tiled_mma_sdp, swapAB=self.SdP_swapAB
687	            ).get_slice(tidx)
688	            smem_thr_copy_KV = utils.make_tiled_copy_B(
689	                smem_copy_atom, tiled_mma_sdp, swapAB=self.SdP_swapAB
690	            ).get_slice(tidx)
691	            # TODO: should this be smem_copy_atom_transposed?
692	            smem_thr_copy_PdSt = utils.make_tiled_copy_A(
693	                smem_copy_atom_transposed, tiled_mma_dkv, swapAB=self.dKV_swapAB
694	            ).get_slice(tidx)
695	            smem_thr_copy_QdOt = utils.make_tiled_copy_B(
696	                smem_copy_atom_transposed, tiled_mma_dkv, swapAB=self.dKV_swapAB
697	            ).get_slice(tidx)
698	            smem_thr_copy_dS = utils.make_tiled_copy_A(
699	                smem_copy_atom, tiled_mma_dq, swapAB=self.dQ_swapAB
700	            ).get_slice(tidx)
701	            smem_thr_copy_Kt = utils.make_tiled_copy_B(
702	                smem_copy_atom_transposed, tiled_mma_dq, swapAB=self.dQ_swapAB
703	            ).get_slice(tidx)
704	            # TODO: what's the number of bits? What if SdP_swapAB
705	            r2s_thr_copy_PdS = cute.make_tiled_copy_C(
706	                cute.make_copy_atom(
707	                    cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(), self.dtype, num_bits_per_copy=2 * self.dtype.width
708	                ),
709	                tiled_mma_sdp,
710	            ).get_slice(tidx)
711	
712	            tSsQ = smem_thr_copy_QdO.partition_S(sQ)
713	            tdPsdO = smem_thr_copy_QdO.partition_S(sdO)
714	            tSsK = smem_thr_copy_KV.partition_S(sK)
715	            tdPsV = smem_thr_copy_KV.partition_S(sV)
716	            tdVsPt = smem_thr_copy_PdSt.partition_S(sPt)
717	            tdKsdSt = smem_thr_copy_PdSt.partition_S(sdSt)
718	            tdVsdOt = smem_thr_copy_QdOt.partition_S(sdOt)
719	            tdKsQt = smem_thr_copy_QdOt.partition_S(sQt)
720	            tdQsdS = smem_thr_copy_dS.partition_S(sdS)
721	            tdQsKt = smem_thr_copy_Kt.partition_S(sKt)
722	            tPsP = r2s_thr_copy_PdS.partition_D(sP)
723	            tdSsdS = r2s_thr_copy_PdS.partition_D(sdS)
724	
725	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
726	            # Predicate: Mark indices that need to copy when problem_shape isn't a multiple
727	            # of tile_shape
728	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
729	            # Construct identity layout for KV
730	            cQ = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_padded))
731	            tQcQ = gmem_thr_copy_QK.partition_S(cQ)
732	            t0QcQ = gmem_thr_copy_QK.get_slice(0).partition_S(cQ)
733	            if cutlass.const_expr(self.head_dim_padded == self.head_dim_v_padded):
734	                tdOcdO = tQcQ
735	                t0dOcdO = t0QcQ
736	            else:
737	                cdO = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded))
738	                tdOcdO = gmem_thr_copy_VdO.partition_S(cdO)
739	                t0dOcdO = gmem_thr_copy_VdO.get_slice(0).partition_S(cdO)
740	            cLSE = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.m_block_size,))
741	            tLSEcLSE = gmem_thr_copy_lse.partition_S(cLSE)
742	
743	            # Allocate predicate tensors for m and n, here we only allocate the tile of k, and
744	            # use "if" on the mn dimension.
745	            # This is to reduce register pressure and gets 2-3% performance gain.
746	
747	            d_head = mQ.shape[cute.rank(mQ) - 1]
748	            d_head_v = mdO.shape[cute.rank(mdO) - 1]
749	
750	            tQpQ = utils.predicate_k(tQcQ, limit=d_head)
751	            if cutlass.const_expr(self.same_hdim_kv):
752	                tdOpdO = tQpQ
753	            else:
754	                tdOpdO = utils.predicate_k(tdOcdO, limit=d_head_v)
755	
756	            # group parameters for compute_one_m_block
757	            mma_params = SimpleNamespace(
758	                thr_mma_sdp=thr_mma_sdp, thr_mma_dkv=thr_mma_dkv, thr_mma_dq=thr_mma_dq,
759	                tSrQ=tSrQ, tSrK=tSrK, tdPrdO=tdPrdO, tdPrV=tdPrV,
760	                tdVrP=tdVrP, tdVrdO=tdVrdO, tdKrdS=tdKrdS, tdKrQ=tdKrQ,
761	                tdQrdS=tdQrdS, tdQrK=tdQrK,
762	                acc_dK=acc_dK, acc_dV=acc_dV,
763	            )
764	            smem_copy_params = SimpleNamespace(
765	                smem_thr_copy_QdO=smem_thr_copy_QdO,
766	                smem_thr_copy_KV=smem_thr_copy_KV,
767	                smem_thr_copy_PdSt=smem_thr_copy_PdSt,
768	                smem_thr_copy_QdOt=smem_thr_copy_QdOt,
769	                smem_thr_copy_dS=smem_thr_copy_dS,
770	                smem_thr_copy_Kt=smem_thr_copy_Kt,
771	                r2s_thr_copy_PdS=r2s_thr_copy_PdS,
772	                tSsQ=tSsQ, tSsK=tSsK, tdPsdO=tdPsdO, tdPsV=tdPsV,
773	                tSsLSEMma=tSsLSEMma, tSsdPsumMma=tSsdPsumMma,
774	                tPsP=tPsP, tdSsdS=tdSsdS,
775	                tdVsPt=tdVsPt, tdVsdOt=tdVsdOt, tdKsdSt=tdKsdSt, tdKsQt=tdKsQt,
776	                tdQsdS=tdQsdS, tdQsKt=tdQsKt,
777	            )
778	            gmem_copy_params = SimpleNamespace(
779	                gmem_thr_copy_dQaccum=gmem_thr_copy_dQaccum, tdQgdQaccum=tdQgdQaccum
780	            )
781	            load_Q_LSE = partial(
782	                self.load_Q_LSE, gmem_tiled_copy_QK, gmem_tiled_copy_LSE,
783	                tQgQ, tQsQ, tQcQ, t0QcQ, tQpQ,
784	                tLSEgLSE, tLSEsLSE, tLSEcLSE, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_q
785	            )
786	            load_dO_dPsum = partial(
787	                self.load_dO_dPsum, gmem_tiled_copy_VdO, gmem_tiled_copy_LSE,
788	                tdOgdO, tdOsdO, tdOcdO, t0dOcdO, tdOpdO,
789	                tLSEgdPsum, tLSEsdPsum, tLSEcLSE, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_q
790	            )
791	            compute_one_m_block = partial(
792	                self.compute_one_m_block, mma_params=mma_params,
793	                smem_copy_params=smem_copy_params, gmem_copy_params=gmem_copy_params,
794	                load_Q_LSE=load_Q_LSE, load_dO_dPsum=load_dO_dPsum,
795	                m_block_max=m_block_max,
796	                softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
797	                softmax_scale_log2=softmax_scale_log2,
798	                aux_data=aux_data,
799	            )
800	
801	            if m_block_min < m_block_max:
802	                # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
803	                # Prologue
804	                # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
805	                # Start async loads of the last mn-tile, where we take care of the mn residue
806	                self.load_V(gmem_thr_copy_VdO, tVgV, tVsV, n_block, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_k,
807	                            headdim=d_head_v)
808	                if cutlass.const_expr(self.V_in_regs):
809	                    cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
810	                self.load_K(gmem_thr_copy_QK, tKgK, tKsK, n_block, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_k,
811	                            headdim=d_head)
812	                cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
813	
814	                if cutlass.const_expr(self.V_in_regs):
815	                    cute.arch.cp_async_wait_group(1)
816	                    cute.arch.barrier()
817	                    tdPrV_copy_view = smem_thr_copy_KV.retile(tdPrV)
818	                    cute.copy(smem_thr_copy_KV, tdPsV, tdPrV_copy_view)
819	                    # Sync to avoid loading Q to smem_q, which overlaps with smem_v
820	                    cute.arch.barrier()
821	
822	                m_block = m_block_min
823	                assert self.num_stages_Q >= self.num_stages_dO
824	                for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_stages_Q):
825	                    if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q == 1 or stage < self.num_stages_Q - 1):
826	                        if stage == 0 or m_block + stage < m_block_max:
827	                            load_Q_LSE(m_block + stage, smem_pipe_write_q=stage)
828	                        cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
829	                    if cutlass.const_expr(stage < self.num_stages_dO):
830	                        if stage == 0 or m_block + stage < m_block_max:
831	                            load_dO_dPsum(m_block + stage, smem_pipe_write_q=stage)
832	                        cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
833	
834	                # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
835	                # Mainloop
836	                # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
837	                # Start processing of the first n-block.
838	                mask = AttentionMask(
839	                    self.m_block_size,
840	                    self.n_block_size,
841	                    seqlen,
842	                    window_size_left,
843	                    window_size_right,
844	                )
845	                mask_fn = partial(
846	                    mask.apply_mask, n_block=n_block, thr_mma=thr_mma_sdp,
847	                    batch_idx=batch_idx, head_idx=head_idx,
848	                    mask_seqlen=True, mask_causal=self.is_causal, mask_local=self.is_local
849	                )
850	                smem_pipe_read_q = cutlass.Int32(0)
851	                smem_pipe_read_do = cutlass.Int32(0)
852	                smem_pipe_write_q = cutlass.Int32(self.num_stages_Q - 1)
853	                smem_pipe_write_do = cutlass.Int32(0)
854	                for m_tile in cutlass.range(m_block_min, m_block_max, unroll=1):
855	                    compute_one_m_block(
856	                        m_tile, smem_pipe_read_q, smem_pipe_read_do, smem_pipe_write_q, smem_pipe_write_do,
857	                        mask_fn=mask_fn,
858	                    )
859	                    smem_pipe_read_q = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read_q, self.num_stages_Q)
860	                    smem_pipe_read_do = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read_do, self.num_stages_dO)
861	                    smem_pipe_write_q = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write_q, self.num_stages_Q)
862	                    smem_pipe_write_do = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write_do, self.num_stages_dO)
863	
864	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
865	            # Epilogue
866	            # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
867	            # If GQA, we scale dK in the postprocessing kernel instead
868	            if cutlass.const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1):
869	                acc_dK.store(acc_dK.load() * softmax_scale)
870	            # reuse sK and sV data iterator
871	            sdK = cute.make_tensor(sK.iterator, sK_layout)
872	            sdV = cute.make_tensor(sV.iterator, sV_layout)
873	            self.epilogue(
874	                acc_dK, acc_dV, mdK, mdV, sdK, sdV,
875	                gmem_tiled_copy_dK, gmem_tiled_copy_dV, tiled_mma_dkv,
876	                tidx, n_block, head_idx, batch_idx, seqlen, d_head, d_head_v
877	            )

879	    @cute.jit
880	    def compute_one_m_block(
881	        self,
882	        m_block: cutlass.Int32,
883	        smem_pipe_read_q: cutlass.Int32,
884	        smem_pipe_read_do: cutlass.Int32,
885	        smem_pipe_write_q: cutlass.Int32,
886	        smem_pipe_write_do: cutlass.Int32,
887	        mma_params: SimpleNamespace,
888	        smem_copy_params: SimpleNamespace,
889	        gmem_copy_params: SimpleNamespace,
890	        load_Q_LSE: Callable,
891	        load_dO_dPsum: Callable,
892	        m_block_max: cutlass.Int32,
893	        softmax_scale: cutlass.Float32,
894	        softmax_scale_log2: cutlass.Float32,
895	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
896	        mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
897	    ):
898	        def load_Q_next():
899	            m_block_next = m_block + (self.num_stages_Q - 1 if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1) else 1)
900	            if m_block_next < m_block_max:
901	                load_Q_LSE(m_block_next, smem_pipe_write_q)
902	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
903	
904	        def load_dO_next():
905	            if m_block + self.num_stages_dO < m_block_max:
906	                load_dO_dPsum(m_block + self.num_stages_dO, smem_pipe_write_do)
907	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
908	
909	        # MMA S
910	        acc_shape_SdP = mma_params.thr_mma_sdp.partition_shape_C(
911	            (self.m_block_size, self.n_block_size) if cutlass.const_expr(not self.SdP_swapAB) else (self.n_block_size, self.m_block_size)
912	        )
913	        acc_S = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_SdP, cutlass.Float32)
914	        acc_S.fill(0.0)
915	        cute.arch.cp_async_wait_group(1 if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1) else 0)
916	        cute.arch.barrier()
917	        sm80_utils.gemm(
918	            mma_params.thr_mma_sdp, acc_S, mma_params.tSrQ, mma_params.tSrK,
919	            smem_copy_params.tSsQ[None, None, None, smem_pipe_read_q if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1) else 0],
920	            smem_copy_params.tSsK,
921	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_QdO, smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_KV,
922	            swap_AB=self.SdP_swapAB,
923	        )
924	        acc_S_pre = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_S)
925	        acc_S_pre.store(acc_S.load())
926	        tLSErLSE = cute.make_fragment_like(smem_copy_params.tSsLSEMma[None, 0])
927	        cute.autovec_copy(
928	            smem_copy_params.tSsLSEMma[None, smem_pipe_read_q if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1) else 0], tLSErLSE
929	        )
930	        acc_S_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_S)
931	        acc_S_pre_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_S_pre)
932	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.score_mod is not None):
933	            for r in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_S_mn, mode=[0]), unroll_full=True):
934	                acc_S_mn[r, None].store(
935	                    call_score_mod(
936	                        self.score_mod,
937	                        acc_S_mn[r, None].load() * softmax_scale,
938	                        0,
939	                        0,
940	                        0,
941	                        0,
942	                        None,
943	                        aux_data,
944	                    )
945	                )
946	        if cutlass.const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
947	            mask_fn(acc_S, m_block=m_block)
948	        bidx = 0
949	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0 and cute.arch.block_idx()[0] == bidx: cute.print_tensor(acc_S_mn)
950	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0 and cute.arch.block_idx()[0] == 1: cute.print_tensor(tLSErLSE)
951	        assert cute.size(acc_S_mn, mode=[0]) == cute.size(tLSErLSE)
952	        for r in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_S_mn, mode=[0]), unroll_full=True):
953	            acc_S_mn[r, None].store(cute.math.exp2(acc_S_mn[r, None].load() * softmax_scale_log2 - tLSErLSE[r], fastmath=True))
954	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0 and cute.arch.block_idx()[0] == bidx: cute.print_tensor(acc_S_mn)
955	
956	        # MMA dP
957	        acc_dP = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_SdP, cutlass.Float32)
958	        acc_dP.fill(0.0)
959	        cute.arch.cp_async_wait_group(1 if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_dO > 1) else 0)
960	        cute.arch.barrier()
961	        sm80_utils.gemm(
962	            mma_params.thr_mma_sdp, acc_dP, mma_params.tdPrdO, mma_params.tdPrV,
963	            smem_copy_params.tdPsdO[None, None, None, smem_pipe_read_do if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_dO > 1) else 0],
964	            smem_copy_params.tdPsV,
965	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_QdO, smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_KV,
966	            hook_fn=load_Q_next if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1) else None,
967	            swap_AB=self.SdP_swapAB,
968	        )
969	        tLSErdPsum = cute.make_fragment_like(smem_copy_params.tSsdPsumMma[None, 0])
970	        cute.autovec_copy(
971	            smem_copy_params.tSsdPsumMma[None, smem_pipe_read_do if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_dO > 1) else 0], tLSErdPsum
972	        )
973	        acc_dP_mn = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_mn(acc_dP)
974	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0 and cute.arch.block_idx()[0] == bidx: cute.print_tensor(acc_dP_mn)
975	        assert cute.size(acc_dP_mn, mode=[0]) == cute.size(tLSErdPsum)
976	        for r in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_dP_mn, mode=[0]), unroll_full=True):
977	            grad_val = acc_S_mn[r, None].load() * (acc_dP_mn[r, None].load() - tLSErdPsum[r])
978	            if cutlass.const_expr(self.score_mod_bwd is not None):
979	                grad_val = call_score_mod_bwd(
980	                    self.score_mod_bwd,
981	                    grad_val,
982	                    acc_S_pre_mn[r, None].load() * softmax_scale,
983	                    0,
984	                    0,
985	                    0,
986	                    0,
987	                    None,
988	                    aux_data,
989	                )
990	            acc_dP_mn[r, None].store(grad_val)
991	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0 and cute.arch.block_idx()[0] == bidx: cute.print_tensor(acc_dP_mn)
992	        rP = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_S, self.dtype)
993	        rP.store(acc_S.load().to(self.dtype))
994	        if cutlass.const_expr(not self.Mma_dKV_is_RS):
995	            tPrP = smem_copy_params.r2s_thr_copy_PdS.retile(rP)  # ((Atom,AtomNum), MMA_N, MMA_N)
996	            cute.copy(smem_copy_params.r2s_thr_copy_PdS, tPrP, smem_copy_params.tPsP)
997	        rdS = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_dP, self.dtype)
998	        rdS.store(acc_dP.load().to(self.dtype))
999	        if cutlass.const_expr(not self.Mma_dKV_is_RS):
1000	            cute.arch.barrier()  # Make sure P is written
1001	        # For hdim 64, It's faster to write to smem_dS first before the dV gemm
1002	        if cutlass.const_expr(not self.Mma_dKV_is_RS):
1003	            tdSrdS = smem_copy_params.r2s_thr_copy_PdS.retile(rdS)
1004	            cute.copy(smem_copy_params.r2s_thr_copy_PdS, tdSrdS, smem_copy_params.tdSsdS)
1005	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.Mma_dKV_is_RS):
1006	            tdVrP = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(rP)
1007	        else:
1008	            tdVrP = mma_params.tdVrP
1009	
1010	        # MMA dK
1011	        sm80_utils.gemm(
1012	            mma_params.thr_mma_dkv, mma_params.acc_dV, tdVrP, mma_params.tdVrdO,
1013	            smem_copy_params.tdVsPt,
1014	            smem_copy_params.tdVsdOt[None, None, None, smem_pipe_read_do if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_dO > 1) else 0],
1015	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_PdSt, smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_QdOt,
1016	            A_in_regs=self.Mma_dKV_is_RS,
1017	            swap_AB=self.dKV_swapAB,
1018	        )
1019	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0 and cute.arch.block_idx()[0] == bidx: cute.print_tensor(mma_params.acc_dV)
1020	        cute.arch.barrier()  # Make sure dS is written
1021	
1022	        # MMA dQ
1023	        def dQ_mma(hook_fn):
1024	            acc_shape_dQ = mma_params.thr_mma_dq.partition_shape_C(
1025	                (self.m_block_size, self.head_dim_padded) if cutlass.const_expr(not self.dQ_swapAB) else (self.head_dim_padded, self.m_block_size)
1026	            )
1027	            acc_dQ = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_dQ, cutlass.Float32)
1028	            acc_dQ.fill(0.0)
1029	            sm80_utils.gemm(
1030	                mma_params.thr_mma_dq, acc_dQ, mma_params.tdQrdS, mma_params.tdQrK,
1031	                smem_copy_params.tdQsdS, smem_copy_params.tdQsKt,
1032	                smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_dS, smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_Kt,
1033	                swap_AB=self.dQ_swapAB,
1034	                hook_fn=hook_fn
1035	            )
1036	            # ((1, 1), num_elements)
1037	            acc_dQ_atomic = gmem_copy_params.gmem_thr_copy_dQaccum.retile(acc_dQ)
1038	            tdQgdQaccum_atomic = gmem_copy_params.tdQgdQaccum[None, None, m_block]
1039	            assert cute.size(acc_dQ_atomic) == cute.size(tdQgdQaccum_atomic)
1040	            for i in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_dQ_atomic), unroll_full=True):
1041	                utils.atomic_add_fp32(acc_dQ_atomic[i], utils.elem_pointer(tdQgdQaccum_atomic, i))
1042	                # utils.atomic_add_fp32(acc_dQ[i], tdQgdQaccum_atomic.iterator + i * tdQgdQaccum_atomic.stride[1])
1043	            # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 64 and cute.arch.block_idx()[0] == bidx: cute.print_tensor(acc_dQ)
1044	
1045	        # If num_stages_Q == 1, we want to do Mma_dK first so we can start loading Q for the next iteration
1046	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1):
1047	            dQ_mma(load_dO_next)
1048	
1049	        # MMA dK
1050	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.Mma_dKV_is_RS):
1051	            tdKrdS = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(rdS)
1052	        else:
1053	            tdKrdS = mma_params.tdKrdS
1054	        sm80_utils.gemm(
1055	            mma_params.thr_mma_dkv, mma_params.acc_dK, tdKrdS, mma_params.tdKrQ,
1056	            smem_copy_params.tdKsdSt,
1057	            smem_copy_params.tdKsQt[None, None, None, smem_pipe_read_q if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1) else 0],
1058	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_PdSt, smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_QdOt,
1059	            A_in_regs=self.Mma_dKV_is_RS,
1060	            swap_AB=self.dKV_swapAB,
1061	            hook_fn=load_dO_next if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q == 1) else None,
1062	        )
1063	        # if cute.arch.thread_idx()[0] == 0: cute.print_tensor(mma_params.acc_dK)
1064	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q == 1):
1065	            cute.arch.barrier()
1066	            dQ_mma(load_Q_next)

1068	    @cute.jit
1069	    def epilogue(
1070	        self,
1071	        acc_dK: cute.Tensor,
1072	        acc_dV: cute.Tensor,
1073	        mdK: cute.Tensor,
1074	        mdV: cute.Tensor,
1075	        sdK: cute.Tensor,
1076	        sdV: cute.Tensor,
1077	        gmem_tiled_copy_dK: cute.TiledCopy,
1078	        gmem_tiled_copy_dV: cute.TiledCopy,
1079	        tiled_mma: cute.TiledMma,
1080	        tidx: cutlass.Int32,
1081	        n_block: cutlass.Int32,
1082	        num_head: cutlass.Int32,
1083	        batch_size: cutlass.Int32,
1084	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1085	        d_head: cutlass.Int32,
1086	        d_head_v: cutlass.Int32
1087	    ):
1088	        rdV = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_dV, self.dtype)
1089	        rdV.store(acc_dV.load().to(self.dtype))
1090	        rdK = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_dK, self.dtype)
1091	        rdK.store(acc_dK.load().to(self.dtype))
1092	        gmem_thr_copy_dK = gmem_tiled_copy_dK.get_slice(tidx)
1093	        gmem_thr_copy_dV = gmem_tiled_copy_dV.get_slice(tidx)
1094	
1095	        batch_idx = batch_size
1096	        head_idx_kv = num_head // self.qhead_per_kvhead if cutlass.const_expr(not self.pack_gqa) else num_head
1097	
1098	        if cutlass.const_expr(self.qhead_per_kvhead == 1):
1099	            # Make sure all threads have finished reading K and V, otherwise we get racy dQ
1100	            # because smem_q could be changed.
1101	            cute.arch.barrier()
1102	            # smem copy atom for dKV
1103	            smem_copy_atom_dKV = cute.make_copy_atom(
1104	                cute.nvgpu.CopyUniversalOp(), self.dtype, num_bits_per_copy=2 * self.dtype.width
1105	            )
1106	            smem_thr_copy_dKV = cute.make_tiled_copy_C(smem_copy_atom_dKV, tiled_mma).get_slice(tidx)
1107	            taccdVrdV = smem_thr_copy_dKV.retile(rdV)
1108	            taccdKrdK = smem_thr_copy_dKV.retile(rdK)
1109	            taccdVsdV = smem_thr_copy_dKV.partition_D(sdV)
1110	            taccdKsdK = smem_thr_copy_dKV.partition_D(sdK)
1111	            # copy acc O from rmem to smem with the smem copy atom
1112	            cute.copy(smem_copy_atom_dKV, taccdVrdV, taccdVsdV)
1113	            cute.copy(smem_copy_atom_dKV, taccdKrdK, taccdKsdK)
1114	
1115	
1116	            if cutlass.const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k):
1117	                mdK_cur, mdV_cur = [t[batch_idx, None, head_idx_kv, None] for t in (mdK, mdV)]
1118	            else:
1119	                mdK_cur, mdV_cur = [cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_k, 0), t[None, head_idx_kv, None]) for t in (mdK, mdV)]
1120	
1121	            blkdK_shape = (self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_padded)
1122	            blkdV_shape = (self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded)
1123	            gdK = cute.local_tile(mdK_cur, blkdK_shape, (n_block, 0))
1124	            gdV = cute.local_tile(mdV_cur, blkdV_shape, (n_block, 0))
1125	            tdKsdK = gmem_thr_copy_dK.partition_S(sdK)
1126	            tdKgdK = gmem_thr_copy_dK.partition_D(gdK)
1127	            tdVsdV = gmem_thr_copy_dV.partition_S(sdV)
1128	            tdVgdV = gmem_thr_copy_dV.partition_D(gdV)
1129	            tdKrdK = cute.make_fragment_like(tdKgdK, self.dtype)
1130	            tdVrdV = cute.make_fragment_like(tdVgdV, self.dtype)
1131	            # sync before all smem stores are done.
1132	            cute.arch.barrier()
1133	            # load acc dK and dV from smem to rmem for wider vectorization
1134	            # Need to check OOB when reading from smem if kBlockN isn't evenly tiled
1135	            # TODO
1136	            cute.autovec_copy(tdKsdK, tdKrdK)
1137	            cute.autovec_copy(tdVsdV, tdVrdV)
1138	
1139	            cdK = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_padded))
1140	            tdKcdK = gmem_thr_copy_dK.partition_S(cdK)
1141	            t0dKcdK = gmem_tiled_copy_dK.get_slice(0).partition_S(cdK)
1142	            if cutlass.const_expr(self.head_dim_padded == self.head_dim_v_padded):
1143	                tdVcdV = tdKcdK
1144	                t0dVcdV = t0dKcdK
1145	            else:
1146	                cdV = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded))
1147	                tdVcdV = gmem_thr_copy_dV.partition_S(cdV)
1148	                t0dVcdV = gmem_tiled_copy_dV.get_slice(0).partition_S(cdV)
1149	            tdKpdK = utils.predicate_k(tdKcdK, limit=d_head)
1150	            if cutlass.const_expr(self.same_hdim_kv):
1151	                tdVpdV = tdKpdK
1152	            else:
1153	                tdVpdV = utils.predicate_k(tdVcdV, limit=d_head_v)
1154	            # copy acc dK and acc_dV from rmem to gmem
1155	            for rest_m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tdKrdK.shape[1])):
1156	                if t0dKcdK[0, rest_m, 0][0] < seqlen.seqlen_k - n_block * self.n_block_size - tdKcdK[0][0]:
1157	                    cute.copy(
1158	                        gmem_tiled_copy_dK,
1159	                        tdKrdK[None, rest_m, None],
1160	                        tdKgdK[None, rest_m, None],
1161	                        pred=tdKpdK[None, rest_m, None] if cutlass.const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else None,
1162	                    )
1163	            for rest_m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tdVrdV.shape[1])):
1164	                if t0dVcdV[0, rest_m, 0][0] < seqlen.seqlen_k - n_block * self.n_block_size - tdVcdV[0][0]:
1165	                    cute.copy(
1166	                        gmem_tiled_copy_dV,
1167	                        tdVrdV[None, rest_m, None],
1168	                        tdVgdV[None, rest_m, None],
1169	                        pred=tdVpdV[None, rest_m, None] if cutlass.const_expr(self.check_hdim_v_oob) else None,
1170	                    )
1171	
1172	        else:  # qhead_per_kvhead > 1, do atomic add
1173	            # For Sm90, we need to sync to avoid racy writes to smem_q
1174	            # For Sm80, we don't need to sync since we're not touching smem
1175	            head_idx_kv = num_head // self.qhead_per_kvhead if cutlass.const_expr(not self.pack_gqa) else num_head
1176	
1177	            if cutlass.const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k):
1178	                mdK_cur, mdV_cur = [t[batch_idx, head_idx_kv, None] for t in (mdK, mdV)]
1179	            else:
1180	                padded_offset_k = seqlen.offset_k + batch_idx * self.n_block_size
1181	                mdK_cur = cute.domain_offset((padded_offset_k * self.head_dim_padded,), mdK[head_idx_kv, None])
1182	                mdV_cur = cute.domain_offset((padded_offset_k * self.head_dim_v_padded,), mdV[head_idx_kv, None])
1183	
1184	            gdV = cute.local_tile(mdV_cur, (self.n_block_size * self.head_dim_v_padded,), (n_block,))
1185	            gdK = cute.local_tile(mdK_cur, (self.n_block_size * self.head_dim_padded,), (n_block,))
1186	            tdVgdVaccum = gmem_thr_copy_dV.partition_S(gdV)
1187	            tdKgdKaccum = gmem_thr_copy_dK.partition_S(gdK)
1188	            acc_dV_atomic = gmem_thr_copy_dV.retile(acc_dV)
1189	            acc_dK_atomic = gmem_thr_copy_dK.retile(acc_dK)
1190	            assert cute.size(acc_dV_atomic) == cute.size(tdVgdVaccum)
1191	            assert cute.size(acc_dK_atomic) == cute.size(tdKgdKaccum)
1192	            for i in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_dV_atomic), unroll_full=True):
1193	                utils.atomic_add_fp32(acc_dV_atomic[i], utils.elem_pointer(tdVgdVaccum, i))
1194	            for i in cutlass.range(cute.size(acc_dK_atomic), unroll_full=True):
1195	                utils.atomic_add_fp32(acc_dK_atomic[i], utils.elem_pointer(tdKgdKaccum, i))
1196	
1197	    @cute.jit
1198	    def advance_pipeline(self, pipeline_index, num_stages: cutlass.Constexpr):
1199	        return pipeline_index + 1 if pipeline_index < num_stages - 1 else 0
1200	
1201	    @cute.jit
1202	    def load_K(
1203	        self,
1204	        gmem_thr_copy: cute.TiledCopy,
1205	        tKgK: cute.Tensor,
1206	        tKsK: cute.Tensor,
1207	        block: cutlass.Int32,
1208	        seqlen: cutlass.Int32,
1209	        headdim: cutlass.Int32,
1210	    ):
1211	        cK = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_padded))
1212	        tKcK = gmem_thr_copy.partition_S(cK)
1213	        t0KcK = gmem_thr_copy.get_slice(0).partition_S(cK)
1214	        tKpK = utils.predicate_k(tKcK, limit=headdim)
1215	        for n in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tKsK.shape[1])):
1216	            # If kBlockN doesn't evenly divide the tiled copy, only the last `n` needs to be checked
1217	            if self.is_even_n_smem_k or n < cute.size(tKsK.shape[1]) - 1 or tKcK[0, n, 0][0] < self.n_block_size:
1218	                # Instead of using tKcK, we using t0KcK and subtract the offset from the limit
1219	                # (seqlen - block * kBlockN). This is because the entries of t0KcK are known at compile time.
1220	                predicate_n = t0KcK[0, n, 0][0] < seqlen - block * self.n_block_size - tKcK[0][0]
1221	                predicate = cute.make_fragment_like(tKpK[None, 0, None])
1222	                for k in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[1])):
1223	                    for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[0])):
1224	                        predicate[i, k] = (tKpK[i, n, k] if cutlass.const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else True) and predicate_n
1225	                cute.copy(
1226	                    gmem_thr_copy, tKgK[None, n, None], tKsK[None, n, None], pred=predicate,
1227	                )
1228	            # We need to clear the sK smem tiles since we'll use sKt for mma_dq
1229	
1230	    @cute.jit
1231	    def load_V(
1232	        self,
1233	        gmem_thr_copy: cute.TiledCopy,
1234	        tVgV: cute.Tensor,
1235	        tVsV: cute.Tensor,
1236	        block: cutlass.Int32,
1237	        seqlen: cutlass.Int32,
1238	        headdim: cutlass.Int32,
1239	    ):
1240	        cV = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.n_block_size, self.head_dim_v_padded))
1241	        tVcV = gmem_thr_copy.partition_S(cV)
1242	        t0VcV = gmem_thr_copy.get_slice(0).partition_S(cV)
1243	        tVpV = utils.predicate_k(tVcV, limit=headdim)
1244	        for n in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tVsV.shape[1])):
1245	            # If kBlockN doesn't evenly divide the tiled copy, only the last `n` needs to be checked
1246	            if self.is_even_n_smem_v or n < cute.size(tVsV.shape[1]) - 1 or tVcV[0, n, 0][0] < self.n_block_size:
1247	                # Instead of using tVcV, we using t0VcV and subtract the offset from the limit
1248	                # (seqlen - block * kBlockN). This is because the entries of t0VcV are known at compile time.
1249	                predicate_n = t0VcV[0, n, 0][0] < seqlen - block * self.n_block_size - tVcV[0][0]
1250	                predicate = cute.make_fragment_like(tVpV[None, 0, None])
1251	                for k in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[1])):
1252	                    for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[0])):
1253	                        predicate[i, k] = (tVpV[i, n, k] if cutlass.const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else True) and predicate_n
1254	                cute.copy(
1255	                    gmem_thr_copy, tVgV[None, n, None], tVsV[None, n, None], pred=predicate,
1256	                )
1257	
1258	    @cute.jit
1259	    def load_Q_LSE(
1260	        self,
1261	        gmem_tiled_copy_Q: cute.TiledCopy,
1262	        gmem_tiled_copy_LSE: cute.TiledCopy,
1263	        tQgQ: cute.Tensor,
1264	        tQsQ: cute.Tensor,
1265	        tQcQ: cute.Tensor,
1266	        t0QcQ: cute.Tensor,
1267	        tQpQ: cute.Tensor,
1268	        tLSEgLSE: cute.Tensor,
1269	        tLSEsLSE: cute.Tensor,
1270	        tLSEcLSE: cute.Tensor,
1271	        block: cutlass.Int32,
1272	        smem_pipe_write_q: cutlass.Int32,
1273	        seqlen: cutlass.Int32,
1274	    ):
1275	        for m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tQsQ.shape[1])):
1276	            # If kBlockM doesn't evenly divide the tiled copy, only the last `m` needs to be checked
1277	            if self.is_even_m_smem_q or m < cute.size(tQsQ.shape[1]) - 1 or tQcQ[0, m, 0][0] < self.m_block_size:
1278	                # Instead of using tQcQ, we using t0QcQ and subtract the offset from the limit
1279	                # (seqlen - block * kBlockM). This is because the entries of t0QcQ are known at compile time.
1280	                predicate_m = t0QcQ[0, m, 0][0] < seqlen - block * self.m_block_size - tQcQ[0][0]
1281	                predicate = cute.make_fragment_like(tQpQ[None, 0, None])
1282	                for k in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[1])):
1283	                    for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[0])):
1284	                        predicate[i, k] = (tQpQ[i, m, k] if cutlass.const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else True) and predicate_m
1285	                cute.copy(
1286	                    gmem_tiled_copy_Q,
1287	                    tQgQ[None, m, None, block],
1288	                    tQsQ[None, m, None, smem_pipe_write_q if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q) > 1 else 0],
1289	                    pred=predicate,
1290	                )
1291	            # We need to clear the sQ smem tiles since we'll use sQt for mma_dK
1292	        # We made sure LSE length is padded so we read `kBlockM` elements so that all
1293	        # elements in sLSE are filled. Without this we might have uninitialized sLSE values.
1294	        for m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tLSEsLSE.shape[1])):
1295	            if tLSEcLSE[0, m][0] < self.m_block_size:
1296	                cute.copy(
1297	                    gmem_tiled_copy_LSE,
1298	                    tLSEgLSE[None, m, block],
1299	                    tLSEsLSE[None, m, smem_pipe_write_q if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_Q > 1) else 0],
1300	                )
1301	
1302	    @cute.jit
1303	    def load_dO_dPsum(
1304	        self,
1305	        gmem_tiled_copy_dO: cute.TiledCopy,
1306	        gmem_tiled_copy_dPsum: cute.TiledCopy,
1307	        tdOgdO: cute.Tensor,
1308	        tdOsdO: cute.Tensor,
1309	        tdOcdO: cute.Tensor,
1310	        t0dOcdO: cute.Tensor,
1311	        tdOpdO: cute.Tensor,
1312	        tdPsumgdPsum: cute.Tensor,
1313	        tdPsumsdPsum: cute.Tensor,
1314	        tdPsumcdPsum: cute.Tensor,
1315	        block: cutlass.Int32,
1316	        smem_pipe_write_q: cutlass.Int32,
1317	        seqlen: cutlass.Int32,
1318	    ):
1319	        for m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tdOsdO.shape[1])):
1320	            # If kBlockM doesn't evenly divide the tiled copy, only the last `m` needs to be checked
1321	            if self.is_even_m_smem_do or m < cute.size(tdOsdO.shape[1]) - 1 or tdOcdO[0, m, 0][0] < self.m_block_size:
1322	                # Instead of using tdOcdO, we using t0dOcdO and subtract the offset from the limit
1323	                # (seqlen - block * kBlockM). This is because the entries of t0dOcdO are known at compile time.
1324	                predicate_m = t0dOcdO[0, m, 0][0] < seqlen - block * self.m_block_size - tdOcdO[0][0]
1325	                predicate = cute.make_fragment_like(tdOpdO[None, 0, None])
1326	                for k in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[1])):
1327	                    for i in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(predicate.shape[0])):
1328	                        predicate[i, k] = (tdOpdO[i, m, k] if cutlass.const_expr(self.check_hdim_oob) else True) and predicate_m
1329	                cute.copy(
1330	                    gmem_tiled_copy_dO,
1331	                    tdOgdO[None, m, None, block],
1332	                    tdOsdO[None, m, None, smem_pipe_write_q if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_dO > 1) else 0],
1333	                    pred=predicate,
1334	                )
1335	            # We need to clear the sQ smem tiles since we'll use sQt for mma_dK
1336	        # We made sure LSE length is padded so we read `kBlockM` elements so that all
1337	        # elements in sLSE are filled. Without this we might have uninitialized sLSE values.
1338	        for m in cutlass.range_constexpr(cute.size(tdPsumgdPsum.shape[1])):
1339	            if tdPsumcdPsum[0, m][0] < self.m_block_size:
1340	                cute.copy(
1341	                    gmem_tiled_copy_dPsum,
1342	                    tdPsumgdPsum[None, m, block],
1343	                    tdPsumsdPsum[None, m, smem_pipe_write_q if cutlass.const_expr(self.num_stages_dO > 1) else 0],
1344	                )
